metadata.rationale: 样本文本的主结论与现有证据整体一致：CDC涉及的是不同类型的公共卫生事务，而不是单一危机集中爆发。存在的主要问题是对新冠死亡证明指导的个别表述做了更口语化、略强化的归纳，容易让读者觉得CDC是在“再次强调”一项更直接的放宽规则，但这种偏差不足以改变全文核心判断。

*   **"UCOD"**: An acronym for Underlying Cause of Death. (High certainty)
*   **"pneumonia"**: Listed as a life-threatening condition. (High certainty)
*   **"acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS)"**: Listed as a life-threatening condition. (High certainty)
*   **"Part I" / "Part II"**: Referenced regarding sections of a death certificate. (High certainty)
*   **"chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD)"**: Listed as a pre-existing condition. (High certainty)
*   **"asthma"**: Listed as a pre-existing condition. (High certainty)
*   **"postmortem testing"**: Mentioned as a type of testing. (High certainty)
*   **"probable" / "presumed"**: Terms used for reporting COVID-19 when a definitive diagnosis cannot be made. (High certainty)
